---
title: "Project_2_Data_624"
author: "Farhod Ibragimov, Alexander Simon, Jackie Yee, Mubashira Qari"
date: "2026-04-18"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
  word_document:
    toc: true
---

=====================================================
**Loading Datasets**
=====================================================

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(fpp3)
library(naniar) # Excellent for visualizing missingness

#  Read the raw data

url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/uzmabb182/Data_624_Team_Project_2/refs/heads/main/StudentData.csv"
std_df <- read_csv(url)

url_1 <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/uzmabb182/Data_624_Team_Project_2/refs/heads/main/StudentEvaluation.csv"
std_eval_df <- read_csv(url_1)

#view(std_df)
#view(std_eval_df)
```

=====================================================
**Data Exploration (EDA)**
=====================================================

```{r}

```


```{r}

```

=====================================================
**Data Preparation (eg, imputation, transformations)**
=====================================================

```{r}

```
